steps.t: Celebrimbor is leading the defence of Caras Gelebren against the armies of the Enemy. You should talk to Celebrimbor.
Faeldor can be found at the northern gates of Caras Gelebren. You have successfully defended against the third assault on Caras Gelebren, but the forc…
Celebrimbor can be found at the House of the Mírdain at the easternmost reaches of Caras Gelebren. Faeldor has asked you to tell Celebrimbor that the …
The Enemy's champion has been defeated, but the day is not yet won. You should talk to Celebrimbor.
